title: Skin & Coat. Dog Supplements & Vitamins with Salmon Oil for Dogs UK. Prevents and Improves Symptoms such as Itching, Dry Skin, Irritation, Hair Loss, and Irritability. 120 soft chews
features: PREVENTS AND IMPROVES SKIN DISEASES: Formulated with fish oil for dogs 18 EPA/12 DHA, salmon oil rich in Omega 3, zinc, biotin and essential vitamins, this supplement strengthens the skin barrier, reduces inflammation and promotes cell regeneration. Ideal for preventing irritation, allergies and flaking, helping to keep skin healthy and protected.

KEEP YOUR DOG'S COAT HEALTHY AND SHINY: Its combination of salmon oil rich in Omega 3 for dogs, biotin and essential amino acids helps maintain a strong, silky and shiny coat. This supplement combats hair loss and improves texture, leaving a healthy finish. Perfect for dogs with dull or brittle coats, helping them look radiant.

COMPLETE AND CERTIFIED FORMULA: Petsuplus Skin and Coat is carefully formulated by animal nutrition experts and complies with the standards of the renowned FCA certification. A combination of vitamins (A, B, C, D, and E) and prebiotics complete the formula and make these supplements one of the most comprehensive on the market.

FLAVOUR AND DOSAGE: Excellent acceptance by your dog thanks to the perfect size of the chews, a soft texture and a delicious flavour. No artificial colours or flavours. Suitable for large, medium and small dogs, as well as all breeds. The recommended daily dose is one chew per day for every 10 kg of body weight.

PETSUPLUS QUALITY: Our brand of food supplements was born out of our love for animals. As pet owners, we like to see our animals happy and full of vitality, which is why we are committed to improving their well-being and quality of life. The motto is clear: Healthy Pet, Happy Pet!

product_details_tab_data.Title: PETSUPLUS Skin & Coat. Dog Supplements & Vitamins with Salmon Oil for Dogs UK. Prevents and Improves Symptoms such as Itching, Dry Skin, Irritation, Hair Loss, and Irritability. 120 soft chews

product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Skin Care, Digestive Health, Immune Support
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: COMPOSITION: Potato products, Meat & animal derivatives (poultry), Glycerine, Pea flour, Inactivated yeast, Yeast (12.1.5), Algae meal (hydrolyzed), Fish oil, Carrot, Salmon oil and Phosphorus. NUTRITIONAL ADDITIVES Vitamins, provitamins: Vitamin A retinylacetate (3a672a) 312500 IE/kg, Vitamin D3 cholecalciferol (3a671) 33750 IE/kg, Vitamin E of all-rac-alpha-tocoferyl acetate (3a700i) 1875 mg/kg, Vitamin B1 thiamine mononitrate (3a821) 140 mg/kg, Vitamin B2 riboflavin (3a825ii) 320 mg/kg, Calcium-D-Pantothenate (3a841) 920 mg/kg, Vitamin B6 pyridoxine hydrochloride (3a831) 94 mg/kg, Vitamin B12 cyanocobalamin (3a837) 2,25 mg/kg, Niacinamide (3a315) 1070 mg/kg, Folic acid (3a316) 2 mg/kg, Biotin (3a880) 750 mg/kg, Vitamin C sodiumcalciumascorbylphosphate (3a312) 4375 mg/kg. Oligo elements: Zinc chelate of glycine hydrate (solid) - Zinc (3b607) 3750 mg/kg, Manganese chelate of glycine, hydrated (3b506) 300 mg/kg. Amino acids: L-Isoleucine (3c383) 11333 mg/kg, L-Histidinemonohydrochloridemonohydrate (3c352) 5825 mg/kg, L-Lysine, monohydrochloride, technically pure (3c322) 2833 mg/kg, DL-Methionine, technically Pure (3c301) 2833 mg/kg, L-Threonine (3c410) 13168 mg/kg, Tryptophan (3c440) 4168 mg/kg, L-Valine (3c371) 15000 mg/kg. TECHNOLOGICAL ADDITIVES Preservatives: Potassium sorbate (1k202) 3000 mg/kg SENSORY ADDITIVES Aromatic compounds: L-Phenylalanine (2b17018) 14168 mg/kg, L-Leucine (2b17012) 20668 mg/kg, L-Arginine (2b17003) 10333 mg/kg ANALYTICAL COMPONENTS: Crude protein 27.25%, Crude fat 8.28%, Crude ash 6.41%, Crude fiber 5.12%, Omega-3 fatty acids1.1%, Sodium 0.11%.
